core.label: Chef Fundamentals
core.description: Programs that look like cooking recipes.

topics.label: Recipe Structure
topics.description: Title, ingredient list, and method steps. Programs are valid recipes.

topics.label: Ingredients as Variables
topics.description: Dry ingredients are numbers, liquid ingredients are Unicode characters.

topics.label: Mixing Bowls & Baking Dishes
topics.description: Mixing bowls are stacks for computation, baking dishes are for output.

topics.label: Method Steps
topics.description: Put, Fold, Add, Combine, Stir, Mix, Clean, Pour. Each step is a stack operation.
